title: NorthPada 10 mm x 20 Meters Outdoor Marine Floating Rope for Boating, Fishing, Rafting, Camping, Hiking, Hunting, Anchor, Mooring, Dock Lines, Kayak, Canoe, Rescuing Reflective Blue
features: This rope is made of Nylon(innner) and Polyester(outer). Ultimate tensile force: 20KN(4,496lbs, 2,000KG); Working tensile force: 15KN(3,372lbs, 1,500KG); Diameter: 10 mm; Cable Length: 20 Meters; Color: Reflective Blue. Package come with: 1 x rope, 1 x drawstring rope bag.
Lightweight and durable: this rope can float on the water, and soaked in water for a long time.
Reflective outer skin, Easy to identify and eye-catching.
Used for water sports and rescue rope, floating rope, anchor mooring rope, boat rope, rafting rope, fishing rope, marine rope, dock lines, kayak canoe tow throw line, sailboat rope and others.

Used for hunting rope, tent rope, camping rope, hiking rope, utility rope, binding line, pull rope, swing rope, winding water pipes, shelf lanyards, clothesline, home and garden decoration, DIY crafting and other.
description: Product Description About this rope Ultimate tensile force: 20KN(4,409lbs, 2,000KG); Working tensile force: 15KN(3,372lbs, 1,500KG). Diameter: 10mm; Cable Length: 20 Meters. Number of spools: 40 pcs; Number of falls: 10; Skin slip rate: 0%; Static elongation: 4.1%. Reflective outer skin, Easy to identify and eye-catching. Very light, it can float on the water, and soaked in water for a long time. Package come with: 1 x rope, 1 x drawstring rope bag.
